generated_oml:
prefix DTDFVocab: "http://example.org/dtdf-vocab#"
prefix base: "http://example.org/base#"
instance LiDARPointClouds : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR
]

instance DepthCameraImages : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IntelD435iDepthCamera
]

instance VehicleSpeed : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VedderESC_Sensing
]

instance SteeringAngle : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VedderESC_Sensing
]

instance ObjectTracks : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR, IntelD435iDepthCamera
]

instance HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Hokuyo UST-10LX LiDAR sensor for point cloud data",
    DTDFVocab:producedData LiDARPointClouds
]

instance IntelD435iDepthCamera : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Intel Deepsense D435i Depth Camera for depth images",
    DTDFVocab:producedData DepthCameraImages
]

instance VedderESC_Sensing : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Vedder Electronic Speed Controller for vehicle speed and steering angle sensing",
    DTDFVocab:producedData VehicleSpeed, SteeringAngle
]

instance VedderESC_Acting : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Vedder Electronic Speed Controller for motor control"
]

instance Motor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor actuator for vehicle propulsion"
]

instance SteeringServo : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Steering servo for vehicle direction control"
]

instance LiDARPointCloudsData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "LiDAR point cloud data stored in SQL database",
    DTDFVocab:fromData LiDARPointClouds,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DBSCANEnabler
]

instance DepthCameraImagesData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Depth camera images data stored in SQL database",
    DTDFVocab:fromData DepthCameraImages
]

instance VehicleSpeedData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Vehicle speed data stored in SQL database",
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleSpeed,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ACCControlLogicEnabler
]

instance SteeringAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Steering angle data stored in SQL database",
    DTDFVocab:fromData SteeringAngle
]

instance ObjectTracksData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Object tracks data stored in SQL database",
    DTDFVocab:fromData ObjectTracks,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo KalmanFilterEnabler
]

instance RealTimeDisplayInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time display of vehicle state, object tracks, and projected path for driver transparency"
]

instance ReportInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Report for troubleshooting by developers"
]

instance ComputationOffloadedInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "ACC system computation offloaded to cloud for processing"
]

instance ThreeDVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "3D visualization of the vehicle and environment"
]

instance DataStoredInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Data stored in SQL database for historical analysis"
]

instance EnableDisableACCAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Enable or disable Adaptive Cruise Control",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance SetDesiredSpeedAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Set desired speed for ACC",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance EmergencyBrakingAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Emergency braking action",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Data monitoring service for real-time display and report generation",
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeDisplayInsight, ReportInsight
]

instance ComputationOffloadingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Computation offloading service for ACC system to cloud",
    DTDFVocab:provides ComputationOffloadedInsight
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Remote management service for ACC control",
    DTDFVocab:provides EnableDisableACCAction, SetDesiredSpeedAction, EmergencyBrakingAction
]

instance ThreeDVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "3D visualization service for vehicle environment",
    DTDFVocab:provides ThreeDVisualizationInsight
]

instance DataStorageService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Data storage service for historical data",
    DTDFVocab:provides DataStoredInsight
]

instance NVIDIAJetpack50SDK : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetpack 5.0 SDK for GPU acceleration and AI",
    DTDFVocab:enables ThreeDVisualizationService
]

instance ROS2Middleware : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS2 middleware for inter-process communication",
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService, ThreeDVisualizationService, DataStorageService
]

instance Python38 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python 3.8 for scripting and software development",
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService, ThreeDVisualizationService, DataStorageService
]

instance Cpp : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "C++ for high-performance computing",
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService, ThreeDVisualizationService, DataStorageService
]

instance MATLABSimulink : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink for simulation and control design"
]

instance SQLDatabase : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SQL database for data storage",
    DTDFVocab:enables DataStorageService
]

instance DBSCANEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "DBSCAN implementation for point cloud clustering",
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance KalmanFilterEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Kalman filter implementation for object tracking",
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance ACCControlLogicEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ACC control logic implementation per ISO 15622",
    DTDFVocab:enables ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService
]

instance DBSCAN : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "DBSCAN algorithm for point cloud clustering",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DBSCANEnabler
]

instance KalmanFilter : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kalman filter for object tracking",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo KalmanFilterEnabler
]

instance ACCControlLogic : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Adaptive Cruise Control control logic per ISO 15622",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ACCControlLogicEnabler
]

instance PhysicalTwin : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "1/10th-scale autonomous vehicle physical twin"
]

instance PhysicalTwinEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Physical twin environment",
    base:contains PhysicalTwin, HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR, IntelD435iDepthCamera, VedderESC_Sensing, VedderESC_Acting, Motor, SteeringServo
]

instance DigitalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "ROS2 package for Digital Twin Entity"
]

instance UserEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "ROS2 package for User Entity"
]

instance PhysicalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "ROS2 package for Physical Twin Entity"
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Motor voltage commands, steering commands, and emergency braking signals generated by the Digital Twin Entity and sent to physical twin for actuation."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time operation with end-to-end latency ≤100 ms and clock synchronization accuracy of 100 ms."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Entity-based architecture with Physical Twin Entity (on vehicle), Digital Twin Entity (cloud), and User Entity (remote); inter-entity communication over Wi-Fi, intra-entity via ROS2; Data Storage external to vehicle."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Design phase (cyber-physical experimentation for development) and operation phase (optimization and health monitoring during vehicle operation)."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "ACC implemented for performance class I (no road curvature capabilities) due to 1/10th-scale vehicle limitations; verification and validation methods not detailed."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "ROS2 for intra-entity communication; Wi-Fi for inter-entity communication; Data Translation FE handles serialization, unit conversion; latency ≤100 ms per 3GPP 22.185."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Physical Twin Entity on vehicle (Jetson Orin Nano); Digital Twin Entity and Data Storage in cloud; User Entity on remote devices."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "ISO 23247 for reference architecture; ISO 15622 for ACC implementation."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Safety-critical system with latency ≤100 ms and clock synchronization accuracy of 100 ms; cybersecurity measures not detailed."
]
